description: ol-duplicate-binder (issue #114): a destructuring `for … in` pattern that repeats a name (`for [:x :x] in …`) binds the same name twice in one pattern. #91's `DestructuringBinderNode` AST makes this checkable by walking `binder.names`. `params` carry the repeated `name` and `form:"destructuring"`. The span points at the second `:x` occurrence. `:pairs` is declared first to isolate the code.
